title: Week of March 30, 2026
summary: This week brought significant improvements to Salesforce automation reliability, including better handling of state and country field configurations that previously caused deployment issues. We also resolved several platform stability problems that were preventing automations from launching properly across all connected systems.

entries.headline: Better detection of Salesforce state and country field issues
details: OpsPal now automatically identifies when Salesforce state and country fields are configured in ways that could break your automations
Deployments are more reliable when working with address-related fields

entries.headline: More reliable Salesforce deployments for complex workflows
details: Multi-step Salesforce automations now run more smoothly with better error handling

entries.headline: Resolved HubSpot automation launch failures
details: Fixed an issue that was preventing HubSpot automations from starting properly
